title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个充满冒险精神和高端质感的户外广告场景，适合用于推广高端户外品牌或产品，吸引喜欢探险和自然的消费者。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个充满冒险精神和高端质感的户外广告场景，适合用于推广高端户外品牌或产品，吸引喜欢探险和自然的消费者。
prompt_original: An outdoor adventure advertisement poster featuring a rugged bearded man in full hiking gear standing confidently beside a massive orange camping tent three times taller than him, fully pitched in a dramatic forest clearing surrounded by towering pine trees beneath a deep starry night sky. The tent features a bold white “WILDCAMP” logo stitched onto the rainfly. Warm cinematic campfire lighting illuminates the scene with realistic shadows and rich outdoor textures, creating a premium adventure-commercial aesthetic. Large rugged serif typography reading “WILDCAMP” dominates the dark sky area in bold orange lettering, while the tagline “Sleep under the stars.” appears elegantly at the bottom. Small grey text in the top-right corner reads “Designed with GPT Image 2.” Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic outdoor advertising style with dramatic atmosphere and high-end commercial composition.
prompt_zh: 一张户外探险广告海报，展示一个留着胡子、穿着全套登山装备的硬汉自信地站在一个巨大的橙色帐篷旁边，这个帐篷比他高三倍，完全搭建在一个被高耸松树环绕的戏剧性森林空地上，背景是深邃星空。帐篷的雨篷上绣有醒目的白色“WILDCAMP”标志。温暖的电影篝火灯光照亮了整个场景，带有逼真的阴影和丰富的户外纹理，营造出一种高端探险商业美学。在黑暗的天空区域，粗犷的衬线字体以大胆的橙色字母主导着“WILDCAMP”，而标语“睡在星空下。”优雅地出现在底部。右上角的小灰色文字写着“由GPT Image 2设计”。照片级真实感，超细致，电影风格的户外广告，具有戏剧性的氛围和高端的商业构图。
